summary: Couling MVP — full backend + frontend regression. 21/21 pytest backend tests pass against public ingress (https://hidden-connect-12.preview.emergentagent.com). Frontend smoke-tested end-to-end via mobile Playwright (390x844): splash → phone → OTP (6 boxes) → profile (display name + emoji) → Chats tab; all 5 tabs (Chats / Calls / Meetings / Circle / Profile) navigate with gold active indicator; Circle shows 'Hidden' badge and 'never shown' privacy banner (no phone numbers leak in UI); Add-contact modal opens with phone + display-name fields; Profile screen shows hidden badge, encrypted toggles, member tier. Phone numbers never appear in contacts/chats/meetings API responses or UI after signup.

issues: React Native Web deprecation warnings (non-blocking): "shadow*" style props (use boxShadow), Image style.resizeMode (use props.resizeMode), props.pointerEvents (use style.pointerEvents).

action_items: Optional polish: migrate deprecated shadow* → boxShadow, Image.style.resizeMode → props.resizeMode, and props.pointerEvents → style.pointerEvents to silence RN-Web warnings. Purely cosmetic, does not affect functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 540-line file. Currently fine for MVP, but split into routers (auth/contacts/chats/calls/meetings) if it grows beyond ~700 lines.
All MongoDB queries correctly use {_id: 0} projections — no ObjectId leakage.
Phone-number leakage protection looks correct: _contact_view, list_chats, list_calls, and _meeting_view never include `phone`. Verified via assertions in test_couling.py.
Token rotation on every verify-otp is good for re-login security, but it invalidates any other active session for that user — acceptable for MVP, document if multi-device support is later required.
Universal demo OTP '123456' is intentionally accepted everywhere — production hardening will require disabling this fallback.
seed_data_creation: Tests create ephemeral users with unique phone numbers like +1999100<timestamp>. No fixed seed data added.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public URL: https://hidden-connect-12.preview.emergentagent.com. Frontend env var is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Universal OTP 123456. Add-contact modal in Circle tab uses testIDs add-contact-btn / add-contact-phone-input / add-contact-name-input / add-contact-submit (verified opened). For deeper meeting-room organizer UI tests, two browser sessions are required (Alice creates, Bob joins via code); only Alice flow was UI-smoke-tested — Bob join + mute-all + private-talk are fully covered at the API layer in test_couling.py.
